name: AfdxGetTokenInt64
title: AfdxGetTokenInt64
syntax: int64 AfdxGetTokenInt64( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[] ); // form 1
int64 AfdxGetTokenInt64( long packet, char protocolDesignatorl[], char tokenDesignator[], long offset, long length, long networkByteOrder ); // form 2
description: This function returns the specified token's data as an 64-bit integer value. With additional parameters (form 2) the user may specify the starting byte, length and byte ordering of the extracted integer value.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of the message that has been created with AfdxInitPacket.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: This is the offset from the beginning of the token's data area. If this is 0, data is copied starting at byte 0 of the token's data area.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: This is the length of the integer value to be returned from the token's data (range 1..8).

return:
Integer value gathered from the token's data.
With AfdxGetLastError you have to check if the function has been processed successfully.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
